• We give engineers time to build the Arm-specific hardware and performance-analysis context needed for the role.
• Core Skills:Experience building reliable automated test systems where reproducibility matter.
• Desirable Skills:Knowledgeable in C/C++/AArch64 assembly.
• Experience with hardware-in-the-loop testing, benchmark automation, or performance dashboards.
• #LI-LB1 Experienced Professionals Join us as a Project Manager and deliver technology powering millions of devices.
• We are looking for an outstanding software engineer with strong CI and automation expertise to build the validation infrastructure behind Arm's performance methodologies and telemetry tools.
• You'll help make performance evaluation on Arm platforms repeatable, scalable, and trustworthy on current and next-generation Arm systems.
• About The TeamWe build Arm's Telemetry solution&mdash.
